Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 700}In this world, there is much filth. This is one reason we require salvation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}At this rate, even when the Salvation is at hand, the world will not be totally clean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}We must continue to prepare for that day. Heaven has charged us with preparing for the Salvation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}Our task is great, and of vital importance. Do not disturb our work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}Listen to the emptiness, and empty your own heart... You will hear a sound.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}That is the sound of Nyx-sama. Her heartbeat... Her breath... Her whisper...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}When the Salvation is at hand, your heart will be free of pain, and you will be at peace.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}But alas, there are still many irredeemable people in the world who cling to this world and doubt Nyx-sama...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 701}The pain in your heart will be as the burning red flames of Hell![n]{f 1 1}
